message:
fix(mvcc): remove .expect() on parking_lot Mutex in stress tests

parking_lot::Mutex::lock() returns MutexGuard directly, not Result.
The 7 .expect("scheduler") calls on runtime.scheduler.lock() caused
compilation failures. All 5 stress tests now pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
